text: As I stand here, I feel enveloped by a sense of mystery and curiosity. The blue light, tilted perspectives, and dimly lit space hint at innovation—an R+D (research and development) environment where new ideas are born. There’s a feeling of anticipation, perhaps even isolation, as if I am on the threshold of discovery, yet also distant from the world outside. It invites reflection on the solitude of the creative process and the glow of possibility within.
